request.name: Generate BRD From File
request.description: Upload a .txt or .docx file to extract its text, create a document record, and dispatch a Celery task to generate a BRD. Poll the returned task_id via GET /documents/task/{task_id}/status.

request.name: Generate Test Cases From File
request.description: Upload a BRD document (.txt or .docx), extract its text, create a document record, and dispatch a Celery task to generate test cases. Poll the returned task_id via GET /documents/task/{task_id}/status.

description.content: Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2
Added as a part of security scheme: oauth2

Validate the document exists and belongs to this org/project, then
dispatch the BRD generation to a Celery worker.  Returns a task_id
that the frontend can poll via GET /documents/task/{task_id}/status.

body.raw:
{
    "context_text": "Business Requirements Document (BRD)

Project Name: DevPilot Automation
Objective: Automate SDLC processes using AI.
Features Needed: Authentication, Project Management, BRD Generation, Test Case generation.
Target Audience: QA Engineers, Developers, Product Managers."
}
